name: content-monetization-team
description: Content monetization team — 5 specialists collaborate to deliver comprehensive commercialization strategies covering CPS affiliate, CPE/CPM ads, marketplace operations, and revenue optimization

displayName.zh: 内容变现商业化专家团

profession.zh: 内容变现商业化专家团

displayDescription.en: 5 specialists collaborate on CPS affiliate commissions, CPE/CPM performance ads, creator-brand marketplace matching, and revenue analysis to maximize content monetization ROI
displayDescription.zh: 5人专家团协作覆盖CPS带货分佣、CPE/CPM效果广告、创作者-品牌交易撮合与收益分析，助力内容创作者和品牌方实现商业化价值最大化

quickPrompts.zh: 帮我评估这个品牌推广任务的收益是否合理
